---
title: "Miscellaneous Helpers"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
format:
  html:
    code-overflow: wrap
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Misc_Helpers}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

# Introduction

Within this package there are a few functions that don't neatly fit into one particular theme, these have been gather here under "miscellaneous helpers". Currently the functions discussed here are:

 - get_quarto_params()
 - 

Each functions requirements and use will be touched

```{r setup}
library(RcTools)
```
